rawDependencyOutputs.fetch-open-prs:
I don't have Azure DevOps MCP tools available in this environment, and there's no Azure DevOps organization configured. The current repository is hosted on GitHub (github.com/MoaidHathot/Orchestra), not Azure DevOps.

To query Azure DevOps pull requests, I need:
1. An Azure DevOps organization URL (e.g., `https://dev.azure.com/YourOrg`)
2. A project name within that organization

Could you provide:
- The Azure DevOps organization URL
- The project name

Or if you want to query GitHub PRs instead (since this repo is on GitHub), I can do that.
